12s         Warning   Unhealthy    pod/notifications-8d7c6b5f4-km3wz    Readiness probe failed: Get "http://10.2.4.18:8081/healthz": dial tcp 10.2.4.18:8081: connect: connection refused

timeline.cause: The pods run but never become Ready. The readiness probe checks port 8081 while the app listens on 8080. After the config change, the probe is knocking on the wrong door, so the Service will not route traffic to the new pods.
receipts: Readiness:      http-get http://:8081/healthz delay=5s timeout=1s period=10s #success=1 #failure=3
12s         Warning   Unhealthy    pod/notifications-8d7c6b5f4-km3wz    Readiness probe failed: Get "http://10.2.4.18:8081/healthz": dial tcp 10.2.4.18:8081: connect: connection refused

timeline.explain: Point the readiness probe at the port the app actually listens on (8080). The pods are healthy. Only the probe is wrong.
timeline.blast_radius: 1 Deployment · 3 pods roll · prod namespace · notifications only
timeline.followup: Decide whether the probe or PORT env is canonical. Pin both in the chart so they cannot drift again.

title: notifications healthy but invisible: probe knocking on the wrong port
